pi_items.source: Found in verifier.py logic using metadata.get('min_file_size_bytes', 5000)
Found in verifier.py logic which explicitly checks width > 300.
Found in verifier.py logic which explicitly checks height > 200.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated JStock portfolio data (AAPL stock, $15,000 invested capital) injected via setup_task.sh. The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/investment_flow.png with a minimum file size of 5000 bytes. The verifier explicitly expects the image dimensions to be greater than 300x200, contradicting the metadata claims of 400x300.
